content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24,020 with mixed sector action — Pharma (+2.17%) and Auto (+0.52%) leading, Energy (-0.67%) lagging. VIX at 17.82 elevated but stable. Book is heavily deployed (67%) with 13 positions; priority is risk management and locking in gains on movers (NAVINFLUOR, PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL) rather than stacking new exposure. HAL has Q4 board meeting May 14 — binary event in 6 sessions, manageable but worth monitoring.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +6% unrealized, CMP 1045.60. Current SL 1030 is already at breakeven+. Trailing further would close gap to <1.5% from CMP (trail-gap discipline). Holding SL at 1030 — well-placed at recent swing support. No-op on values; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1% unrealized at 124.05, recovering today (+1.36%). Gold thesis intact as macro hedge. SL 119 (~4% below CMP) gives appropriate room for ETF chop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ADANIPORTS at all-time-high zone (CMP 1727.70, 52w high 1748.60). Current SL 1710 already at breakeven. Trailing tighter would breach 1% trail-gap rule (1727 - 1710 = 17 = 1.0%). At threshold — leaving SL at 1710 is correct. No-op MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BANDHANBNK -1.6%, CMP 206.48 vs entry 209. SL at 206 is ~0.2% below CMP — at risk of self-stopout on next downtick. Q4 PAT +68% YoY thesis intact, NIM 6.2%, brokerage upgrades. Reasoning supports holding through to either SL trigger or recovery; the position will resolve itself shortly. Not loosening SL (rejected anyway), not tightening (already too tight). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HAL +1.3%, CMP 4635. Current SL 4600 is 0.75% below CMP — on the tight edge of the 1% trail-gap rule. Q4 board meeting May 14 (6 sessions) — within event-window watch but not yet 3 sessions. Holding SL at 4600 (no-op). Will reassess for tightening or partial trim closer to May 14. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NAVINFLUOR +1.8%, CMP 7022 (lifetime high zone, 52w high 7200). Current SL 6960 is 0.9% below CMP — at the tight edge of trail-gap rule. Strong Q4 (PAT +114% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.3%), Geojit TP 8500. Keeping SL at 6960 (no-op). Will trail higher only if CMP advances meaningfully. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TITAGARH +0.2%, CMP 842.45. SL 825 (~2% below CMP) appropriate for capital goods volatility. Q4 results pending — within 3-session watch window. Position size small enough; tight SL caps risk. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL has rallied today to 366.95 (+6.1% intraday from prior close, now near entry 369 — actually CMP 366.95 is below entry but well above day low). Tightening SL from 358 to 362 to reduce risk while leaving 1.3% trail-gap below CMP. Strong Q4 (PAT +30% YoY), Motilal TP 325 raised. Risk reduces from 11/share to 7/share."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +0.8%, CMP 826.60. SL 815 (~1.4% below CMP) — within trail-gap budget. Q4 beat (PAT +18%, India volume +9% best-in-class). Need more cushion before trailing higher. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "M&M -1.3%, CMP 3255 vs entry 3290, SL 3245 (~0.3% below CMP). Tight — at risk of stopout. Q4 PAT +42% YoY thesis intact but stock fading off intraday high. Letting SL do its job; not loosening. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +1.3%, CMP 1278.30. SL 1265 (~1% below CMP) — at trail-gap floor. Q4 beat (PAT +144.7% QoQ flattered by tax, but underlying strong), Encora deal closed. Hold at current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE -1%, CMP 3010 vs entry 3025. SL 2950 (~2% below CMP) — appropriate. Defence shipbuilding thesis intact, Q4 PAT +24% YoY. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS -0.4%, CMP 806.40. SL 780 (~3.3% below CMP) — appropriate for post-gap consolidation. Q4 record revenue/EBITDA, AuM +21% YoY. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 478min ago, still OPEN. Past 12:45 PM, MIS deadline 2:30 PM approaching. Cancelling pending order — telecom breakout thesis stale after 8 hours unfilled. Will not stack a duplicate. Treating as cancel-via-expiry; no new emission needed."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1030 (entry 984 +4.7%) already locked-in profit; trail-gap to CMP 1045 is 1.5% — at floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge thesis intact; SL 119 ~3.3% below CMP, appropriate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; trail-gap exactly 1% — cannot tighten further without breaching gap rule. Allow run to 1800 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL; will resolve in next 1-2 sessions one way or other. Microfinance recovery thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven/entry. May 14 board meeting watch — will tighten or trim at 3-session boundary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, near 52w high. SL 6960 at trail-gap floor (0.9% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 pending — keeping standard SL ~2% below for capital goods volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 358 to 362 — risk per share reduced from 11 to 7. CMP 366.95, gap 1.4% below CMP — clean of trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Standard SL, FMCG volatility lower."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL near CMP; Q4 thesis intact. Will resolve quickly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2950.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence cycle intact, SL ~2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 780.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; SL 3.3% below — appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SRF, AJANTPHARM, M&M (already held) all printed strong Q4 today — fresh entries skipped to avoid over-deployment (current 67% deployed, room for 13% more). Will watch Pharma (Ajanta, Aurobindo, Lauruslabs) for follow-through. WOCKPHARMA +22% needs catalyst clarification before any consideration.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Defence/Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), Auto (M&M), IT (COFORGE), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Ports (ADANIPORTS), FMCG (MARICO), and Gold ETF. 13 positions is at the upper end of manageable; no new entries this tick — focus is risk management. HAL Q4 board May 14 (6 sessions) is the binary event to watch. HFCL pending MIS order from morning is stale and will be left to expire. Deployed 67%, cushion to 80% soft cap = 13%, keeping powder dry for high-conviction setups."
}
